name: Talon Metals Corp.
description: Talon Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the acquisition and advancement of high-grade nickel, copper, and cobalt projects. The company is best known for its Tamarack Nickel-Copper-Cobalt Project located in Minnesota, USA, where it holds an earn-in right to acquire a majority interest. Talon Metals is committed to supplying critical minerals necessary for the transition to a low-carbon economy, particularly for the electric vehicle battery supply chain. The company is publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol TLO.
